verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It could be just as easy to count Every grain of sand on every shore Give a name to every star Between here and heaven's door I could tell you How a seed, planted in a ground, could make a tree Much easier than I could tell you All the blessings He has given me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I could never tell all the good things He has done But if I try, I'll start by saying, First of all He sent His son He blessed my life with happiness And He has given me so much more And besides all these, At the end, I'll step on heaven's shore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you ask me why the lightening flashes accross the sky Oh, why the sun shines through the day And darkness falls at evening time Maybe I could give an answer to you that would satisfy But if you ask me why He loved me, I could never tell you the reason why

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Maybe I could give an answer If you ask me why the lightening flashes accross the sky But if you ask me why He loved me, I could never tell you the reason why
